pages.title: 印: seal monolith
pages.text: Press $(l)V$() and write $(l)印$() onto a block. The chosen block becomes the seal monolith, then the circle asks for a second glyph. That second glyph becomes an area rule centered on the block.$(br2)Implemented seals: 心, 命, 救, 息, 忍, 净, 坚, 稳, 隐, 力, 怒, 泉.

pages.title: 净印
pages.text: When a player enters a 净印 area, it removes 1 negative effect. The same player can trigger the same seal once every 60 seconds.$(br2)净印 does not process ink wound. Write 净 directly for ink wound.

pages.title: Body glyph seals
pages.text: $(l)心印$(): temporary max health inside the area, plus slow interval healing.$(br)$(l)命印$(): lethal hits lock to 1 health, with multiple charges by stave tier.$(br)$(l)救印$(): lethal hits trigger invulnerability; hits during invulnerability do not spend charges, and ink wound is cleaned over time.

pages.title: 命印 and 救印
pages.text: 命印 charges: wood 2, stone 3, copper 3, iron 4, gold 4, diamond 5, netherite 6.$(br2)救印 requires stone or above: stone 1 charge/3s invulnerability, copper 2/4s, iron 2/5s, gold 2/5s, diamond 3/5s, netherite 4/5s.

pages.title: Stance seals
pages.text: $(l)坚印/稳印/隐印$(): dynamic stance effects inside.$(br)$(l)力印/怒印$(): taking damage inside builds counterattack power; 怒 still requires diamond or above.$(br)$(l)净印$(): clears 1 negative effect on entry, with a 60s same-monolith cooldown.

pages.title: 泉: direct cast
pages.text: Position: immediate healing. Press $(l)G$() and write $(l)泉$() to heal yourself. Press $(l)V$() and write $(l)泉$() onto a block to heal players within 3 blocks of that target.$(br2)It does not restore hunger and does not require standing still.

pages.title: 泉印
pages.text: 泉印 creates an area spring: players inside heal at intervals without standing still.$(br2)Wood 5 blocks/20s/heal 5/4m$(br)Stone 7/18s/7/5m$(br)Copper 9/16s/8/6m$(br)Iron 12/14s/10/7m

pages.title: 泉印 high tiers
pages.text: Gold 14 blocks/12s/heal 12/6m$(br)Diamond 18/10s/14/9m$(br)Netherite 24/8s/16/10m$(br2)Leaving the area stops triggers. Breaking the monolith ends the seal.

pages.title: 息印
pages.text: 息印 is a temporary camp. Stand still inside for 3 seconds to gain small healing and hunger recovery. Moving resets the timer; leaving stops it.$(br2)Radius and duration use the stave that wrote 印.

pages.title: 墨: ink field
pages.text: Position: risk and reward amplifier. Writing $(l)墨$() creates a moving ink field around the caster; writing $(l)墨$() again closes it. The caster sees a monochrome ink filter.$(br2)$(l)墨$() cannot be sealed. One player can maintain only one ink field.

pages.title: 墨 field tiers
pages.text: $(l)墨$() has no fixed duration. The player controls when it opens and closes.$(br2)Radius: wood 8, stone 10, copper 12, iron 14, gold 16, diamond 18, netherite 22.$(br2)Death, logout, or dimension change closes it.

pages.title: 墨 field rules
pages.text: Player damage, healing, and knockback against monsters scale by stave tier: wood x2, stone x2.2, copper x2.4, iron x2.6, gold x2.8, diamond x3, netherite x4.$(br2)Monsters also strengthen and pressure spawns continue. Higher staves reduce monster stat boosts but shorten spawn interval. Other glyphs cost 20% extra durability; kills inside can drop ink cores.
